info.name: AI Secure Data Intelligence Platform
info.description:
Complete API collection for the AI Secure Data Intelligence Platform.

## Setup:
1. Run the server: `uvicorn backend.main:app --reload --port 8000`
2. Import this collection into Postman
3. All requests hit http://127.0.0.1:8000

## Endpoints:
- GET  /health
- GET  /patterns
- POST /analyze
- POST /analyze/upload
- POST /analyze/batch

request.description: Returns service info and all available endpoints.
Check if server is running and whether API key is configured.
Get all detection pattern types with their risk levels and scores.
Analyze clean text — expect risk_level: safe, 0 findings.
Text containing PII: email, phone, SSN, credit card.
SQL query with embedded password and email.
Chat log with API key and password — block_high_risk enabled.

body.raw:
{
  "input_type": "log",
  "content": "2026-03-10 10:00:01 INFO User login email=admin@company.com
password=admin123
api_key=sk-prod-xyz123456789012345678901
Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VyIjoiYWRtaW4ifQ.abc123def456ghi789
2026-03-10 10:00:02 ERROR stack trace: NullPointerException at service.java:45
2026-03-10 10:01:45 WARN Failed login attempt for user root
2026-03-10 10:01:46 WARN Failed login attempt for user root
2026-03-10 10:01:47 WARN Failed login attempt for user root
debug=true verbose_logging=true
aws_secret_access_key=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY",
  "options": {
    "mask": true,
    "block_high_risk": false,
    "log_analysis": true
  }
}

request.description: Full log with: API key, password, JWT, AWS credential, stack trace, brute force, debug leak. This is the main demo — expect CRITICAL risk.
Log showing repeated failed login attempts — brute force detection.
Log with AWS key, JWT, and debug leak.
mask=false: masked_content will be null, values are not redacted.
block_high_risk=true: action will be 'blocked' for critical content.
Should return HTTP 400 — content cannot be empty.

## File Upload

### Steps in Postman:
1. Body → form-data
2. Key `file` → change type to **File** → select your .log file
3. Key `mask` → `true`
4. Key `block_high_risk` → `false`
5. Send

### Supported: .log .txt .sql .csv .json
Analyze 2 items in one call. Returns array of results.
Batch with text, SQL, and log — tests multi-input handling.
